title: Gevo to Sell Luverne, Minnesota Ethanol Facility to A.E. Innovation; Will Retain Isobutanol Assets for Future Innovation
content: Gevo, Inc. announced that it has entered into a definitive agreement to sell Agri-Energy, LLC (â€œAgriâ€), a wholly owned subsidiary of Gevo, to A.E. Innovation, LLC (â€œA.E.â€) for $7 million. The transaction includes Agriâ€™s 18-million-gallon-per-year ethanol-production facility located in Luverne, Minnesota. Gevo will retain ownership of certain isobutanol-production-related assets and a portion of the vacant land at the site for future use.
author: Analysts Account
